commands.review_summary:
The PR changes WebChat composer CSS so the bottom model selector sizes to content with a viewport cap and also widens the base inline-select menu rule.

PR surface: Source +1. Total +1 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.10 keep the bottom selector at a 220px preferred width and ellipsize the model/thinking label, and the inspected before screenshot shows that truncation.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair job is needed; this is already a focused implementation PR with sufficient visual proof and no actionable findings.

target.title: fix(webchat): make model selector width adaptive to prevent long name…
target.body: Fixes #96934. ## What Problem This Solves When the model name is long (e.g. `opencode/deepseek-v4-flash`) and Reasoning is enabled, the model selector trigger at the bottom of the chat composer truncates the combined label (model name + thinking level) with ellipsis because the parent container caps width at 220px. ## Why This Change Was Made The bottom composer model control used `flex: 0 1 220px`, giving the model selector a fixed preferred width of 220px and allowing it to shrink. Long labels combined with the thinking level text exceed this width and get truncated via `text-overflow: ellipsis`. Changed to `flex: 0 0 auto` with `max-width: 70vw`, so the selector width adapts to its content and can display the full label regardless of model name length. ## User Impact Users with long model/provider names (e.g. any model with a provider prefix like `opencode/deepseek-v4-flash`, `modelstudio/qwen3.5-plus`) can now read the full model name and thinking level without hovering or opening the dropdown. ## Evidence **Behavior addressed**: Model selector trigger truncates long model names at 220px. **Real environment tested**: Local gateway (port 18999) serving Control UI build, Chromium browser. **Exact steps or command run after this patch**: 1. Start gateway with `pnpm openclaw gateway --port 18999 --allow-unconfigured` 2. Open WebUI in browser at `http://127.0.0.1:18999` 3. Observe model selector label at bottom of chat session **Evidence after fix** (new - adaptive width): **Before fix** (old - 220px fixed, label truncated): **code change**: ```css - flex: 0 1 220px; + flex: 0 0 auto; + max-width: 70vw; ``` **Observed result after fix**: The model selector now expands to fit the full model name + thinking level text. On narrow viewports, it caps at 70vw to prevent overflow. ## Regression Test Plan - `pnpm ui:build` — exit 0 - `pnpm build` — exit 0 - Visual verification: before/after screenshots attached **Evidence after fix** (new - adaptive width): **Before fix** (old - 220px fixed, label truncated):
